nav.footer: Scan local projects and safely preview changes

mode.dashboardDesc: Workspace asset health, cleanup opportunities, and project scan status.
mode.browseDesc: Search, view, and organize asset references across projects.
mode.historyDesc: Compare completed scans and inspect asset changes over time.
mode.duplicatesDesc: Find assets with identical BLAKE3 content hash, keep the recommended path and remove extra copies.
mode.unusedDesc: Check assets not referenced by any code, safely preview before deleting.
mode.optimizeDesc: Review optimization suggestions for size, format, and compression.
mode.settingsDesc: Manage local data, appearance, and storage paths.
mode.lintDesc: Code-level asset usage findings and hygiene rules.
mode.precheckDesc: Check images before adding them to a project.
mode.imageToolsDesc: Manually convert, resize, and export selected or uploaded images.
mode.aiCanvasDesc: Arrange images, comments, AI context, and preview-only operations on one canvas.
mode.projectsDesc: Manage project roots, workspace health, and scan coverage.
mode.promptsDesc: Create and manage AI prompt templates with variables.
mode.tagsDesc: Browse and manage AI-generated tags and categories across all projects.

aiCanvas.searchPanelDesc: Add scanned assets, annotate them, then ask for a preview.
aiCanvas.searchPlaceholder: Search assets by name, path, OCR, or AI tags...
aiCanvas.addHint: Click a row to add it
aiCanvas.missingScan: Run a scan before searching assets.
aiCanvas.emptyTitle: Build an image and file canvas
aiCanvas.emptyDesc: Search assets, place them on the canvas, pin comments to image regions, and create AI-assisted preview cards. Nothing is applied from this view.
aiCanvas.aiContextOnly: AI is not configured, so this card packages canvas context for review.
aiCanvas.aiResponse: AI can use the selected asset, comments, OCR, tags, and file metadata as context for the next operation.
aiCanvas.defaultComment: Edit this region based on the note.
aiCanvas.composerPlaceholderUnavailable: Configure an AI backend to start chatting
aiCanvas.noPreviewChanges: No file changes were produced by this preview.
aiCanvas.previewGenerated: A preview image card was created. The source file was not changed.
aiCanvas.editTaskCreated: I captured this as an edit task and pinned it to the selected image.
aiCanvas.editTaskLimit: Image generation and pixel editing are not wired yet, so the source image will not change here.
aiCanvas.editTaskNext: This task card keeps the prompt, marked region, and asset context for the next image-edit backend.
aiCanvas.uploadPending: Image upload is not wired to the backend yet.
aiCanvas.noMentionImages: No images on the canvas yet.
aiCanvas.extractTextDisabled: Select or mention a catalog image first.
aiCanvas.photoStageDisabled: Add at least one image to the canvas first.
aiCanvas.photoStagePrompt: Act as a professional photographer and art director. Stage all visible image cards on the canvas into a polished composition with balanced spacing, hero/supporting scale, and clean visual flow, then capture the staged canvas screenshot. After capture, reply with the staging concept and rationale.
aiCanvas.extractTextPrompt: Extract visible text from the selected or mentioned catalog images with OCR. Return the result grouped by filename.
aiCanvas.noOCRTargets: Select or mention a catalog image before extracting text.
aiCanvas.searchNeedsConfirmation: I couldn't find a suitable direct match. I’m showing the closest {{count}} candidate previews for review. Reply with which one to add, or say no if none of them fit.
aiCanvas.imageOptimizationAdviceDesc: Suggest compression or format proposal cards.
aiCanvas.backendConfigureAgent: Install or detect an Agent CLI in Settings
aiCanvas.addedSearchResults: Added {{count}} matching images to the canvas.
aiCanvas.addedUploadImages: Added {{count}} uploaded image to the canvas.
aiCanvas.assetRemovedError: This asset is no longer on the canvas.
aiCanvas.clearConfirmMessage: All cards, comments, proposals, and chat history will be removed. This cannot be undone.
aiCanvas.pendingProposals: {{count}} pending proposals — select one or approve all
aiCanvas.deleteConfirmMessage: This card and its comments will be removed. This cannot be undone.
aiCanvas.deleteSelectedConfirmMessage: {{count}} selected cards and their comments will be removed. This cannot be undone.
aiCanvas.noSavedSessionsDesc: Save your current canvas to pick up where you left off.
aiCanvas.unsavedChangesMessage: You have unsaved changes. Loading a different session will discard them.
aiCanvas.sessionDeleteConfirm: Delete this saved session? This cannot be undone.
aiCanvas.newCanvasMessage: Start a fresh canvas. Your current session is still saved and can be loaded from the sessions list.

tags.renameCategoryDesc: Rename "{{category}}" across all AI category fields.
tags.emptyDesc: Run AI Tag on your assets to generate tags.
tags.emptyCategoriesDesc: Run AI Tag on your assets to generate categories.
tags.deleteDesc: Remove {{count}} tag(s) from all assets. This cannot be undone.
tags.clearCategoryDesc: Clear {{count}} category value(s) from matching assets. Tags and descriptions are preserved.
tags.translateTooltip: Fill missing AI tag translations for the locales selected in AI settings. Existing translations are kept.
tags.suggestEmpty: Type to search or create a tag

action.batchDeleteConfirmBody: This will permanently delete {{count}} files ({{size}}). This cannot be undone.

search.placeholder: Search path, project, format, or content hash…

dashboard.noProjectsDesc: Add a project folder and Aisets will scan assets, references, and duplicate files.

history.emptyDesc: Run a scan to start recording completed snapshots.
history.singleDesc: Scan history needs at least two completed scans before it can compare changes.
history.sameScanDesc: Base and target must be different before Aisets can compare them.
history.noChangesDesc: The selected snapshots match on asset paths, content hashes, references, unused transitions, byte delta, and optimization delta.
history.changesDesc: The selected snapshots differ. Review the scan totals first, then inspect the changed assets below.

directoryPicker.title: Select Project Directory
directoryPicker.description: Showing directories available to the environment running Aisets.
directoryPicker.pathPlaceholder: Enter an absolute path the Aisets server can access
directoryPicker.noSubdirsDesc: You can add the current directory directly.
directoryPicker.selectStartDesc: Enter a path and press "Go", or start browsing from the default directory.
directoryPicker.projectTypeHint: This controls whether zero references can count as unused; duplicates and optimization still run independently.
directoryPicker.detectIntentFailed: Could not detect a project type. Choose one manually.
directoryPicker.addDisabledOcrBusy: OCR is running. You can add after it finishes.

preview.canApplyDesc: This operation can be applied. Please review the changes before writing to files.
preview.blockedDesc: This operation has blockers that must be resolved before applying.

assetList.emptyDesc: Try clearing the search, or switch to a different asset scope.

status.notApplicableHelp: Usually an asset pack: assets may be used outside this repo, so zero code references are not used to decide unused status. Scans with reference analysis disabled also appear here.

help.unused: No code references found — safe to clean up. You'll see a delete preview before anything is removed.
help.possiblyUnused: No references found, but this is a shared library, mixed project, or has incomplete scan coverage — so we can't be sure it's truly unused. Check manually before deleting.
help.notApplicable: Asset packs aren't referenced by code — that's normal. They're excluded from unused checks.
help.duplicate: This file is identical or visually very similar to another — consider keeping just one copy.
help.optimizable: This file can be smaller or in a better format. Compressing it would save space.
help.optimized: An optimized variant already exists for all recommendations on this file.
help.referenced: Found at least one code reference — this asset is in use.

status.helpIntro: Each asset is automatically labeled based on its code references, helping you spot what's safe to clean up. These labels only affect suggestions — you can always act on any file manually.

reason.skippedByUser: This analysis was disabled by the current scan profile.
reason.skippedByThreshold: This analysis was skipped to avoid long scan time.
reason.notApplicable: Skipped because this project type does not use code-reference analysis.

code.label: Code Project
code.description: Best for website or app repos. Aisets scans supported code references and only marks zero-reference assets as cleanup-safe when coverage is complete.

assetPack.label: Asset Pack
assetPack.description: Best for image, icon, or art packs. Unused is not checked because assets may be consumed outside this repo; duplicates, metadata, optimization, and organization still run.

library.label: Shared Asset Library
library.description: Best for libraries imported by other projects. Internal references are scanned, but zero-reference assets are only possible unused and need review.

mixed.label: Mixed / Not Sure
mixed.description: Choose this when unsure. Aisets scans conservatively: zero-reference assets become possible unused, not cleanup suggestions.

settings.workspaceDesc: Name this local workspace and choose where Add Project starts.
settings.defaultRootHint: Used only as the initial folder for the Add Project picker. Leave blank to start from the server's current working directory.
settings.autoScanHint: Remember the preference for future startup behavior.
settings.projectsDesc: Registered project roots grouped by workspace.
settings.noProjectsDesc: Add a project folder and Aisets will scan assets, references, and duplicates
settings.appearanceDesc: Choose how Aisets looks on this machine.
settings.imagePreviewHint: Show the enlarged image preview when hovering over thumbnails.
settings.imagePreviewDelayHint: Seconds to wait before showing the enlarged preview. Decimals are supported.
settings.imagePreviewSizeHint: Width and height in px for the enlarged preview.
settings.imageBackgroundHint: Use this background for asset thumbnails and previews across the app.
settings.preferredEditorDesc: Choose which code editor to use when opening files from the asset drawer.
settings.scanningDesc: Control scan-time preferences and repo-relative exclusions.
settings.scanOnOpenHint: After Aisets starts and projects load, automatically rescan the catalog once.
settings.scanProfileHint: Used for all scans, including automatic rescans after adding or changing projects.

scanProfile.fastHint: Walk files, read image metadata, and group exact duplicates.
scanProfile.fullHint: Also compute references, near duplicates, and optimization suggestions.
scanProfile.customHint: Choose which expensive analyses to run.

settings.scanAnalysesHint: Skipped analyses show as not computed instead of zero results.

scanAnalyses.referencesHint: Find code references and unused assets.
scanAnalyses.nearDuplicatesHint: Compare perceptual hashes for visually similar files.

settings.excludePatternsHint: Patterns are project-relative. Choose Global rules or rules appended for one project type.

excludeScope.mixedHint: Added only for mixed or uncertain projects.

settings.excludeScopeGlobalNote: Global rules apply to every project before project-type rules are added. A plain filename matches that file at any folder depth.
settings.excludeScopeIntentNote: These rules are added only for {{intent}} projects. Global rules still apply first. A plain filename matches that file at any folder depth.
settings.ocrEnabled: Use OCR in search and filters
settings.ocrEnabledHint: Allow Browse, Custom Filters, and ⌘ P to use cached OCR text. This does not read images by itself.
settings.ocrLanguagesHint: Choose the free open-source language packs to use and download to this machine.
settings.ocrLimitsHint: The defaults work for most projects. Adjust only when you need to control speed, computer load, or search tolerance.
settings.ocrLimitsHelpDesc: These settings affect OCR runtime cost and search tolerance.
settings.ocrLimitsKeepDefaults: If unsure, keep the defaults. OCR still runs in background batches and never recognizes text while typing in Browse or search.
settings.ocrMaxPixelsHint: Images above this pixel count are skipped so large screenshots or oversized artwork do not make OCR run too long. 2000000 is about 2 megapixels.
settings.ocrBatchSizeHint: How many images to process per batch. Larger values can finish sooner, but CPU load may be more noticeable while OCR is running.
settings.ocrConcurrencyHint: How many images to OCR at the same time. 1 is safest; 2 is faster but uses more CPU. The current maximum is 2 to protect performance.
settings.ocrFuzzySearchHint: Allow search to match common OCR noise such as missing, extra, or dirty characters. For example, ERARZAN can still match tarzan. Turn off for exact text containment only.
settings.ocrRuntimeHint: Install local language packs, then build the OCR cache for the current catalog. Images are not uploaded.
settings.ocrNotInstalled: OCR language packs are not installed.
settings.ocrCacheScopeHint: OCR cache stays local. It is reused by project, path, content hash, language, and engine version. Removing OCR clears all OCR cache.
settings.ocrEngineInstallHintDarwin: Install Tesseract with: brew install tesseract
settings.ocrEngineInstallHintLinux: Install Tesseract with your package manager, for example: sudo apt-get install tesseract-ocr
settings.ocrEngineInstallHintWindows: Install Tesseract with: winget install --id UB-Mannheim.TesseractOCR --exact
settings.ocrEngineInstallHintFallback: Install the Tesseract command-line tool, then restart Aisets.
settings.ocrProgress: processed {{processed}}, ready {{ready}}, failed {{failed}}, skipped {{skipped}}, cache {{cacheHit}}, dedup {{dedup}}
settings.ocrProgressWithSkipReason: processed {{processed}}, ready {{ready}}, failed {{failed}}, skipped {{skipped}}, cache {{cacheHit}}, dedup {{dedup}}; top skip reason: {{skipReason}} ({{skipReasonCount}})
settings.ocrRunConfirmIntro: Aisets will build or refresh OCR text for the current catalog.
settings.ocrRunConfirmLocal: Images stay on this machine and are processed locally.
settings.ocrRunConfirmBatch: It runs in batches of {{batchSize}} so the UI remains responsive; Run OCR keeps going until no eligible images remain.
settings.ocrRunConfirmSettings: Current OCR settings are saved first. Newly selected languages make older OCR cache stale and will be reprocessed.
settings.ocrRunConfirmSearch: Ready OCR text becomes searchable in Browse, Custom Filters, and ⌘ P. It is never used for cleanup/delete decisions.
settings.ocrRemoveConfirmMessage: This removes all installed language packs and clears OCR cache for all workspaces/projects. Image files are not deleted, but image-text search needs OCR to be rebuilt.
settings.lintCustomRulesDesc: Add image checks. After saving and rescanning, matched assets appear on the Lint page.
settings.lintRulesImportReady: Lint rules imported into the draft. Save to apply them.
settings.lintRulesImportInvalid: Import failed. Choose a valid Aisets lint rules JSON file.

lintRuleHelp.default: Runs during catalog scan and appears in Lint.
lintRuleHelp.missing-lazy-loading: Reports large usage without loading or fetch priority.
lintRuleHelp.missing-dimensions: Reports usage without stable width/height or aspect ratio.
lintRuleHelp.no-responsive-image: Reports large raster usage without srcset.
lintRuleHelp.svg-as-img: Reports SVG loaded through when styling may be needed.
lintRuleHelp.bg-content-image: Reports large raster CSS background images.
lintRuleHelp.duplicate-asset: Reports exact duplicate assets outside the preferred path.
lintRuleHelp.exif-gps-privacy: Reports GPS metadata in code project images.

lintPresetMessage.Hero image missing priority: Hero image is missing priority loading.
lintPresetMessage.Large image without srcset: Large image is missing responsive srcset.
lintPresetMessage.Icon file too large: Icon file is larger than expected.
lintPresetMessage.Oversized JPEG: JPEG image exceeds the team size budget.
lintPresetMessage.Animated GIF too large: Animated GIF file is too large.

lintPresetSuggestion.Hero image missing priority: If this is an above-fold hero image, add fetchpriority="high" or loading="eager".
lintPresetSuggestion.Large image without srcset: Provide srcset for content images that scale across viewport sizes.
lintPresetSuggestion.Icon file too large: Compress or resize the file. If it is not an icon, move it out of the icon folder.
lintPresetSuggestion.Oversized JPEG: Compress the JPEG or convert it to AVIF/WebP when supported.
lintPresetSuggestion.Animated GIF too large: Recompress the GIF or replace it with a video/WebP animation.

settings.deleteLintRuleDesc: This removes the lint rule from settings. Save settings to keep the change.
settings.customFiltersDesc: Saved Browse filters based on path and asset metadata.
settings.customFiltersHint: Groups are ORed. Clauses inside a group are ANDed. OCR clauses match cached local OCR results only.

customFilterFieldDesc.ocrSource: Which OCR engine produced the result
customFilterFieldDesc.aiTag: Any tag in AI-generated tag list
customFilterFieldDesc.aiContainsFace: Whether a human face is visible

settings.deleteCustomFilterDesc: This removes the filter from settings. Save settings to keep the change.
settings.deleteCustomFilterGroupDesc: This removes the OR group and every rule inside it.
settings.deleteCustomFilterClauseDesc: This removes the rule from this filter.
settings.customFiltersHelpDesc: Save frequently used Browse filter conditions as reusable rules.
settings.customFiltersHelpLogic: Clauses inside one group all need to match. Separate groups are alternatives, so matching any group is enough.
settings.customFiltersHelpStep1: Create a filter, name it, and turn Enabled on.
settings.customFiltersHelpStep2: Choose a field, operator, and value for each rule.
settings.customFiltersHelpStep3: Save settings, then use the filter from Browse or the command palette.
settings.customFiltersHelpFolderSuffixTitle: Assets under folders ending in icons
settings.optimizationDesc: Set defaults for optimization previews and apply workflows.
settings.defaultQualityHint: Stored as the preferred quality for future optimization flows.
settings.workersHint: Number of concurrent image conversions during estimation. Higher values are faster but use more CPU and memory.
settings.avifSpeedHint: 1 = slowest (best compression), 10 = fastest (larger files). Estimation always uses speed 10 for fast feedback.
settings.autoApplyHint: Stored only as a preference; it does not modify files automatically.
settings.thresholdsDesc: Tune when optimization suggestions are reported. Changes take effect on next scan.
settings.svgMinSavingsHint: Only flag SVG files when minification saves at least this percentage.
settings.maxDimensionHint: Flag images whose width or height exceeds this pixel value.
settings.fileSizeWarningHint: Report a warning when file size exceeds this value.
settings.fileSizeCriticalHint: Escalate to critical severity above this value.
settings.pngAlphaCheckHint: Suggest alternative formats for PNG files that do not use transparency.
settings.strategyValidationHint: Formats support svg, png, jpg, jpeg, gif, webp, and avif. Quality must be 0-100, AVIF speed must be 1-10, and size thresholds cannot be negative.
settings.strategyValidationOutputRequired: This operation needs an output format.
settings.strategyValidationAvifSpeed: AVIF speed must be between 1 and 10.
settings.strategyNameHint: Give this strategy a recognizable name.
settings.strategyPriorityHint: Lower values run first; the first matching strategy is applied.
settings.strategyAlphaHint: Filter by whether images have transparency.
settings.strategyAnimatedHint: Filter by whether images contain animation frames.
settings.strategyMinBytesHint: Optional. Only images larger than this file size match.
settings.strategyMinWidthHint: Optional. Only images wider than this value match.
settings.strategyMinHeightHint: Optional. Only images taller than this value match.
settings.strategyOperationHint: Choose what to do with images that match this strategy.
settings.strategyOutputFormatHint: Target format after conversion or recompression.
settings.strategyQualityHint: 0-100. Lower values make smaller files with lower quality.
settings.strategyAvifSpeedHint: 1-10. Lower values compress better but run slower.
settings.strategyResizeHint: Maximum image width or height in px; larger images are scaled proportionally.
settings.strategyPreserveAnimationHint: Keep original animation frames when converting or recompressing.
settings.removeStrategyConfirmDesc: You can only restore it by adding it again or resetting defaults.
settings.resetStrategiesConfirmDesc: Strategies will return to the system defaults.
settings.strategyMatchDesc: Images matching all conditions below will use this strategy
settings.strategyActionDesc: Choose how to process matched images
settings.strategiesInlineHelp: Each strategy is a rule: images matching the conditions are processed by the action. Lower priority values are checked first — the first match wins.
settings.strategiesCollapsedDesc: Rules that decide how each image format is converted, recompressed, or resized. Strategies are checked by priority — the first match applies.
settings.thresholdsCollapsedDesc: Control when optimization suggestions trigger. Set file size limits, maximum dimensions, and SVG savings thresholds.
settings.externalToolsCollapsedDesc: Optional CLI tools that supplement the built-in optimizer. Detected tools must be explicitly enabled before use.
settings.resetExternalToolsConfirmDesc: All external tools will return to the default disabled state.
settings.resetSectionConfirmDesc: This will overwrite the current unsaved draft.
settings.resetSectionConfirmBody: Reset this section? Current unsaved changes will be overwritten.
settings.optimizationStrategiesHelpDesc: Strategies decide how each image is converted, recompressed, or resized during estimate, preview, apply, and script generation.
settings.optimizationStrategiesHelpMatch1: A strategy applies only when format, alpha, animation, file size, and dimensions all match.
settings.optimizationStrategiesHelpMatch2: Strategies are checked by priority from low to high; disabled strategies are skipped.
settings.optimizationStrategiesHelpMatch3: One image can chain at most one resize stage and one convert or recompress stage. Resize runs first.
settings.optimizationStrategiesHelpAction1: convert writes a new format, such as PNG/JPEG to AVIF or transparent PNG to WebP.
settings.optimizationStrategiesHelpAction2: recompress keeps the format and changes compression, such as lowering quality for large WebP or recompressing animated GIF.
settings.optimizationStrategiesHelpAction3: resize limits the maximum width and height. When blank, the maximum image dimension setting above is used.
settings.optimizationStrategiesHelpAction4: Lower AVIF speed compresses better but is slower; higher values are faster but may create larger files.
settings.optimizationStrategiesHelpDefault1: SVG is minified; opaque PNG and large JPEG prefer AVIF.
settings.optimizationStrategiesHelpDefault2: Transparent PNG converts to WebP; large WebP is recompressed; animated GIF preserves animation while recompressing.
settings.optimizationStrategiesHelpDefault3: Oversized raster images resize first, then can convert or recompress.
settings.externalToolsHelpDesc: External tools enhance the built-in optimizer. Detected tools are not enabled automatically — you must turn them on manually.
settings.externalToolsHelpPriority1: The built-in optimizer handles most image conversions, compression, and resizing.
settings.externalToolsHelpPriority2: If you have any of the tools below installed, you can enable them to improve processing for specific formats.
settings.externalToolsHelpPriority3: Enabled external tools are used automatically when the built-in optimizer cannot handle a task.
settings.externalToolsHelpStatus1: "Missing" means the tool is not installed on your system — the switch is disabled.
settings.externalToolsHelpStatus2: "Detected" means installed, but you still need to turn on the switch to use it.
settings.externalToolsHelpStatus3: After installing or removing a tool, click "Rescan" to update the status.
settings.hotkeysDesc: Keyboard shortcuts available in the local UI.
settings.versionDevHint: DEV mode uses a simulated update so the UI flow can be tested.
settings.updateAlreadyCurrent: Aisets is already up to date.
settings.updateRestartDesc: Aisets was updated, but the running server is still the old process.
settings.updateRestartBody: Click Restart now to restart the local server and download the UI package for {{version}}. The current host, port, and base path are preserved automatically.
settings.updateRestartKeepFlags: Manual fallback: reuse the same flags if you started Aisets with a custom --host or --base-path.
settings.installAppHint: Add Aisets as a standalone app from this browser.
settings.installInstalled: Aisets is already installed as an app.
settings.installManualHint: This browser has not exposed an install prompt yet. Refresh and try again, or install from the address bar or browser menu. On macOS Safari, choose File > Add to Dock.
settings.resetSettingsConfirm: Reset all app settings to defaults and uninstall OCR language packs? Projects, scans, and files stay intact, but startup preferences, optimization defaults, custom filters, and installed OCR data will be removed.
settings.dataDesc: Export, import, or reset local Aisets state.
settings.clearScanHistoryHint: Removes scan history and catalog snapshots. Projects, settings, and files stay intact.
settings.clearScanHistoryConfirm: Clear scan history and the current catalog snapshot? Projects, settings, files, and OCR cache stay intact, but Browse and analysis views will be empty until the next scan.
settings.clearOCRCacheHint: Removes all OCR results (including AI OCR). Run OCR or AI OCR again to re-process.
settings.clearOCRCacheConfirm: Clear all OCR results (including AI OCR)? This cannot be undone. You will need to run OCR again to restore them.
settings.clearAITagCacheHint: Removes all AI tags, categories, and descriptions. Run AI tagging again to re-analyze.
settings.clearAITagCacheConfirm: Clear all AI tag results? This cannot be undone. You will need to run AI tagging again to restore them.
settings.resetDatabaseHint: Deletes all projects, scans, labels, notes, tasks, and action history. This cannot be undone.
settings.resetConfirm: Reset the local Aisets database? This removes projects, scans, labels, notes, tasks, and action history, restores built-in prompt presets, and clears browser-side caches.
settings.storageDesc: Current local storage paths used by the API server.
settings.workspacesHint: Switch tracked project groups or create a new one. The active workspace owns the visible project list.
settings.workspaceIconHint: PNG, JPEG, GIF, or WebP up to 512 KB. Used in workspace lists and the workspace header.
settings.workspaceIconTypeError: Choose a PNG, JPEG, GIF, or WebP image.
settings.workspaceIconSizeError: Workspace image must be 512 KB or smaller.
settings.removeWorkspaceConfirm: Delete {{name}}? Projects stay on disk, but this workspace and its tracked project list will be removed.
settings.llmEnabledHint: Enable a local LLM provider for AI tagging, classification, and search
settings.llmApiKeyHint: Required if the server has authentication enabled
settings.llmOmlxGrammarHint: Install with grammar mode for reliable JSON output: brew reinstall omlx --with-grammar
settings.llmVisionModelHint: Global default model. Override per feature in the Routing tab.
settings.llmVisionModelHint_omlx: Global default model. Override per feature in the Routing tab.
settings.llmVisionModelHint_openai_compat: Global default model. Override per feature in the Routing tab.
settings.llmConcurrencyHint: Number of images to process simultaneously. Default is 1.
settings.llmConcurrencyWarning: Higher values consume more GPU/CPU resources. Keep at 1 for local models (Ollama, LM Studio) unless you have a multi-GPU setup.
settings.llmTimeoutHint: Maximum seconds per VLM request. Increase for complex images or slower hardware. Range: 30–600.
settings.systemPromptHint: Prepended to all AI operations. Edit in Prompt Manager.
settings.systemPromptPlaceholder: Enter system prompt... (applied to all AI operations)
settings.llmAutoLocaleHint: AI responds in the language matching your UI locale setting.
settings.llmTranslationLocalesHint: Which locales to translate AI Tags into. English is always required for embedding search.
settings.localeChangeAffectsTranslation: New language is not in your AI Tag translation locales. Go to AI → Prompts to add it.
settings.agentEnabledHint: Allow coding agents (Codex CLI, Claude Code) to generate cleanup plans from scan findings.
settings.agentAdapterHint: Which coding agent CLI to use. Auto detects the first available.
settings.agentModelHint: Model name for the agent CLI (e.g. gpt-5.5, claude-sonnet-4-6, gemini-3-pro). Leave empty for CLI default.
settings.agentLocalLLMHint: Uses the LLM connection configured above.
settings.agentLocalLLMNotConfigured: LLM not configured — set up Connection Settings first
settings.aiTagDescription: Select a workspace and project to generate categories, tags, and descriptions
settings.aiTagCustomPromptHint: Customize the prompt sent to the vision model for image analysis
settings.aiTagPromptGuide: The VLM must return valid JSON with these fields: "category" (string), "tags" (string array), "description" (string), "languages" (string array), "containsFace" (boolean), "sceneType" (string), "estimatedLocation" (string or null), "locationConfidence" (string). Extra fields are ignored. If JSON parsing fails, the result is marked as failed — use "Reset to default" to restore.
settings.aiOcrPromptGuide: The VLM must return valid JSON with these fields: "text" (string — all visible text preserving layout) and "languages" (string array of ISO 639-3 codes). Extra fields are ignored. If JSON parsing fails, the result is marked as failed.
settings.strategyAICategoryHint: Only match images classified by AI tagging — leave empty to match all
settings.aiOcrDescription: Select a workspace and project to extract text from images using vision AI
settings.vlmBackendNoModels: No models loaded — configure in Local LLM tab
settings.vlmBackendNoBackends: No Local LLM or Agent CLI is available yet. Configure a Local LLM connection or run Agent CLI detection first.
settings.embedSearchTypeHint: Text uses AI Tag metadata, Image uses CLIP vectors, Hybrid combines both.
settings.embedSearchThresholdHint: Minimum cosine similarity for text embeddings (0–1).
settings.embedImageSearchThresholdHint: Minimum cosine similarity for text-to-image matches (0–1). CLIP-style image scores are usually lower.
settings.embedImageDynamicHint: After the image threshold, keep image matches within this margin from the top score.
settings.embedSearchLimitHint: Maximum number of results returned per search (1–100).
settings.embedCalibrationHint: Preview semantic results, mark matches, and calculate recommended thresholds.
settings.embedCalibrationNoResults: No semantic results matched this query.
settings.embedCalibrationPreviewFailedHint: Aisets could not reach the local backend. Check that the server is still running, then try again.
settings.embedCalibrationLabelTimeout: Saving the label took too long. Please try again.
settings.embedCalibrationAnalysisDesc: Calculate recommended thresholds from saved match/reject labels.
settings.embedCalibrationAnalysisNoLabels: No saved labels yet. Preview a query and mark results before analyzing.
settings.embedCalibrationAnalysisNoScores: Saved labels could not be scored. Re-run embedding or preview these queries again.
settings.embedCalibrationLabelsHelp: The total number of results you marked as match or reject.
settings.embedCalibrationScoredHelp: Labels that could be compared against current embeddings and used in the calculation.
settings.embedCalibrationSkippedHelp: Labels that could not be scored, usually because the matching embedding is missing or stale.
settings.embedCalibrationTextHint: Text threshold controls text embedding results. Higher is stricter and returns fewer but cleaner matches.
settings.embedCalibrationImageHint: Image threshold controls text-to-image similarity. Margin keeps image matches close to the best image score, reducing loose visual matches.
settings.embedCalibrationMetricHelp: Precision means how many shown results are correct. Recall means how many correct results were kept. F1 balances both. Skipped labels are labels that could not be scored, usually because the matching embedding is missing or stale.
settings.embedCalibrationApplyDone: Calibration suggestion applied to settings draft.
settings.embedCalibrationNoLabels: Preview results and mark Match / Reject, then Analyze.
settings.embedInputFieldsHint: Which AI Tag fields to include when generating text embeddings. Takes effect on next embedding run.
settings.embedDescription: Generate vector embeddings for semantic search across assets.
settings.embedRepairCheckFailed: Unable to check semantic embedding index.
settings.embedRepairNeedsRepair: Repair is available for the current semantic embedding index.
settings.clearEmbeddingsDescription: Removes all embedding vectors. Run embedding again to re-generate.

error.api_unavailable: Aisets could not reach the backend API. Check that the local server is running, then try again.
error.invalid_json_response: The backend returned an invalid response. Please try again.
error.update_elevated_permission_required: Aisets cannot update itself because {{path}} requires administrator permission. Run `sudo aisets update` in Terminal, then restart Aisets.
error.project_path_not_directory: Project path must be a directory: {{path}}
error.scan_already_running: A scan is already running. Wait for it to finish before changing projects or the database.
error.settings_import_version_unsupported: This settings export version is not supported.
error.settings_quality_invalid: Optimization quality must be between 0 and 100.
error.custom_filter_id_duplicate: Custom filter id must be unique.
error.custom_filter_group_required: Custom filter requires at least one group.
error.custom_filter_clause_required: Custom filter group requires at least one clause.
error.custom_filter_bytes_invalid: Custom filter byte value must be zero or greater.
error.custom_filter_status_invalid: Custom filter status must be unused or referenced.
error.custom_filter_boolean_invalid: Custom filter boolean value must be true or false.
error.custom_filter_confidence_invalid: Custom filter confidence must be between 0 and 1.
error.custom_filter_ocr_status_invalid: Custom filter OCR status is invalid.
error.settings_ocr_languages_required: At least one OCR language is required.
error.settings_ocr_max_pixels_invalid: OCR max pixels must be greater than zero.
error.settings_ocr_batch_size_invalid: OCR batch size must be greater than zero.
error.settings_ocr_concurrency_invalid: OCR concurrency must be 1 in v1.
error.ocr_disabled: Enable and save OCR settings before running OCR.
error.ocr_not_installed: Install OCR language packs before running OCR.
error.ocr_engine_unavailable: OCR engine is unavailable. Install the Tesseract command-line tool and try again.
error.project_name_empty: Project name must not be empty.
error.workspace_name_empty: Workspace name must not be empty.
error.workspace_icon_invalid: Workspace image must be a PNG, JPEG, GIF, or WebP data URL under 512 KB.
error.workspace_last_required: At least one workspace is required.
error.settings_svg_savings_invalid: SVG min savings percent must be between 0 and 100.
error.settings_max_dimension_invalid: Max dimension must not be negative.
error.settings_file_size_warning_invalid: File size warning threshold must not be negative.
error.settings_file_size_critical_invalid: File size critical threshold must not be negative.
error.settings_file_size_critical_below_warnin: Critical threshold must be greater than or equal to warning threshold.
error.asset_ids_required: At least one asset must be selected.
error.preview_stale_missing_candidate: Preview is stale — the optimization candidate has been removed
error.project_icon_invalid: Project image must be a PNG, JPEG, GIF, or WebP data URL under 512 KB.

activity.ocrCounts: processed {{processed}}, ready {{ready}}, failed {{failed}}, skipped {{skipped}}, cache {{cacheHit}}, dedup {{dedup}}
activity.scanLockedTooltip: Wait for the scan to finish
activity.ocrLockedAction: OCR is running. Stop OCR before changing the catalog.
activity.aiTagCounts: Processed {{processed}}, ready {{ready}}, failed {{failed}}, skipped {{skipped}}, cache {{cacheHit}}, dedup {{dedup}}
activity.aiOcrCounts: Processed {{processed}}, ready {{ready}}, failed {{failed}}, skipped {{skipped}}, cache {{cacheHit}}, dedup {{dedup}}

toast.projectAlreadyExists: Project already exists in this workspace: {{path}}
toast.settingsCatalogScanningReset: Catalog scan reset. Save to apply.

reason.image_dimensions_large: Image dimensions exceed common web display sizes.
reason.asset_file_large: Large assets can slow down initial page loading.
reason.png_without_alpha: PNG without alpha often compresses better as JPEG, WebP, or AVIF.
reason.png_with_alpha: PNG with alpha can be more efficiently stored as WebP.
reason.svg_can_minify: SVG can be minified without changing source references.
reason.svg_contains_embedded_raster: SVG contains embedded raster image data; minifying XML will not meaningfully reduce the embedded bitmap.
reason.svg_large_low_minify_savings: Large SVG has low XML minification savings; size is likely driven by path complexity or raster-like content.

suggestion.use_responsive_or_smaller_source: Consider responsive variants or a smaller source image.
suggestion.review_compression_or_modern_format: Review compression settings or try modern image formats.
suggestion.try_modern_photographic_format: Try a photographic format for non-transparent raster images.
suggestion.try_alpha_preserving_format: Try WebP format which supports alpha with better compression.
suggestion.preview_svg_minify: Preview minified SVG output before applying.
suggestion.extract_embedded_raster_or_use_modern_fo: Extract the raster image and use WebP, AVIF, or PNG instead of wrapping it in SVG.
suggestion.review_complex_svg_or_raster_format: Simplify the vector artwork, or export it as WebP or AVIF when it is raster-like.

duplicates.title: Duplicates
duplicates.description: Identical files scattered across different paths. Merge to keep one copy and rewrite references.
duplicates.noExactDesc: All scanned assets appear to be unique.
duplicates.noSimilarDesc: No visually similar assets were detected in this scan.
duplicates.mergeConfirmBody: Remove {{count}} duplicate copies ({{size}}) and update {{refs}} references to use the preferred paths.

optimize.title: Optimize
optimize.description: Assets with format, size, or compression recommendations.
optimize.estimateMeta: Based on current selection or visible slice
optimize.quickOptimizeDesc: This will estimate and preview {{count}} assets in one step. You will still confirm before applying changes.
optimize.quickStep1: Estimate actual output sizes for each asset
optimize.quickStep2: Build a preview of all planned operations
optimize.quickStep3: Show results for your review before applying
optimize.quickRiskReplace: Mode: Replace original — originals will be overwritten. References will be updated if enabled.
optimize.quickRiskSafe: Mode: Safe variants — originals are preserved. Optimized copies are created alongside.
optimize.estimatePromptDesc: These {{count}} items have not been estimated yet. Aisets will calculate candidate output sizes before opening the optimization preview.
optimize.selectionLockedDesc: Selection is locked during estimate and preview so items cannot be added or removed mid-run.
optimize.replaceModeDesc: Successful conversions write the new format and delete the original only when safety checks pass.
optimize.safeVariantModeDesc: Default mode writes sibling files without deleting originals or editing references.
optimize.referenceChangesDesc: Code references that can be safely located will be updated.
optimize.referenceChangesOffDesc: This mode will not edit references automatically.
optimize.deleteOriginalsDesc: Only replace mode with safe reference coverage can delete originals.
optimize.singleProjectRequired: Choose one project in the left rail, or select assets from the same project before applying optimization.
optimize.partialApplyDesc: Applicable items will be written; {{count}} blocked items will be skipped.

blockedReason.optimizer_tool_timeout: Optimization took too long for {{tool}}. Try a smaller image or optimize this animation manually.
blockedReason.no_effective_savings: Candidate output is not smaller than the original.
blockedReason.operation_unsupported: No automated optimization is available for this format.
blockedReason.asset_not_found: The previewed asset was not found.
blockedReason.replace_requires_code_project: Only code projects can safely replace converted originals.
blockedReason.replace_requires_reference_update: This file has references; update references before deleting the original.
blockedReason.reference_update_blocked: One or more references cannot be safely updated.

optimize.skippedBlockedDesc: Estimated items that are not worth applying are excluded from preview and apply.
optimize.noApplicableOperations: No selected assets have applicable optimization after estimation.
optimize.noRecommendations: No optimization recommendations match your filter.
optimize.allDoneDesc: No items need optimization right now.
optimize.help.quickOptimize: Estimate and preview all selected assets in one step. You still confirm before applying.
optimize.help.estimate: Measure the actual optimized size for each asset. Results are cached for reuse.
optimize.help.optimizeAction: Build a detailed preview of all planned changes. Review before applying.
optimize.help.script: Generate a shell script with CLI commands for manual optimization outside the app.
optimize.noStrategies: No enabled strategies. Add strategies in Settings → Optimization
optimize.help.replaceOriginal: Overwrite the original file with the optimized version. Without this, a new file is created alongside the original.
optimize.help.updateReferences: Automatically update import paths and references when the file extension or name changes. Only applies to Code projects with detected references.
optimize.afterNeedsEstimate: Run estimate first to see projected size
optimize.estimatePromptInfo: We'll estimate {{count}} assets first, then continue to preview automatically. Selection is locked during this process.
optimize.quickOptimizeSubtitle: {{count}} assets · estimate, preview, then apply in one flow
optimize.keyboardHint: ⌘ Enter to confirm · Esc to cancel

filter.requiresOCRHint: This custom filter uses OCR, but OCR is currently off.
filter.requiresAIHint: This custom filter uses AI tagging, but AI is currently off.

browse.empty: No assets match the current filters
browse.semanticEmptyDesc: Use natural language to find assets by visual meaning, OCR text, and AI tags.
browse.semanticWaiting: Press Enter to run AI search.
browse.semanticPressEnter: Semantic results use the current project, folder, status, and AI filters.
browse.emptyOCRTextHint: {{count}} images finished OCR with no recognized text, so visible image text may not be searchable yet.
browse.unusedNotApplicableDesc: {{count}} assets are in asset packs or scans without checked references. Zero references are not deletion evidence, so they are not included in unused cleanup suggestions.
browse.unusedAdvisoryDesc: {{count}} assets are only possibly unused because reference coverage is advisory. Review manually; they are not suggested as unused cleanup.
browse.notApplicableDesc: These {{count}} assets are not checked for unused status. Most are asset packs; scans with reference analysis disabled also appear here.
browse.aiTagDisabledHint: Configure AI provider in Settings → AI
browse.aiTagProgress: Tagged {{processed}}/{{queued}} ({{ready}} ready, {{failed}} failed, {{skipped}} skipped, {{cacheHit}} cached, {{dedup}} dedup)

lint.title: Lint
lint.description: Code-level usage patterns that may affect performance or accessibility.
lint.empty: No lint findings match your filter.
lint.emptyDesc: Try adjusting the search or severity filter.
lint.notApplicableDesc: This project type skips reference-dependent lint. Use duplicates, optimization, metadata, and filters to review asset quality.
lint.allClearDesc: No lint findings detected. Your asset usage looks healthy.

missing-lazy-loading.name: Missing lazy loading
missing-lazy-loading.message: loads a large image without a loading attribute, which may affect scroll performance.
missing-lazy-loading.suggestion: Add loading="lazy" for below-fold images, or loading="eager" / fetchpriority="high" for critical above-fold images.

missing-dimensions.name: Missing dimensions
missing-dimensions.message: lacks explicit width/height or aspect ratio, which may cause layout shift (CLS).
missing-dimensions.suggestion: Add width/height attributes, or provide both width and height/aspect-ratio via Tailwind/CSS.

large-inline-import.name: Large inline import
large-inline-import.message: Importing {{kb}}KB asset as raw/inline may bloat the JS bundle.
large-inline-import.suggestion: Use a standard URL import instead. Only use ?raw/?inline for very small SVG/icons.

no-responsive-image.name: No responsive image
no-responsive-image.message: Large raster image ({{kb}}KB) without srcset may waste bandwidth on small screens.
no-responsive-image.suggestion: Provide multiple sizes via srcset for content images, or compress the source for fixed-size UI images.

svg-as-img.name: SVG as img
svg-as-img.message: SVG loaded via cannot be styled with CSS or animated interactively.
svg-as-img.suggestion: Keep for static SVGs. Switch to inline SVG or a component when you need CSS color control or animation.

img-as-background.name: Image as background
img-as-background.message: Large decorative image (alt="") loaded via . Consider whether it needs to occupy the DOM.
img-as-background.suggestion: Use CSS background/pseudo-elements for pure decoration. Keep if you need sizing or loading behavior.

bg-content-image.name: Background content image
bg-content-image.message: Large raster image ({{kb}}KB) loaded via CSS background-image cannot use lazy loading.
bg-content-image.suggestion: Use with loading="lazy" for content images. For visual backgrounds, compress/convert the source or add a preload strategy.

duplicate-asset.name: Duplicate asset
duplicate-asset.suggestion: Remove this copy and update references to use the preferred path.

exif-gps-privacy.name: EXIF GPS Privacy
exif-gps-privacy.message: Image contains GPS coordinates that may expose physical location
exif-gps-privacy.suggestion: Strip EXIF GPS data before committing if the location is sensitive.

commandPalette.semanticNoResults: No semantic matches found. Try different phrasing.
commandPalette.semanticHint: Type a natural-language description to find similar assets.
commandPalette.aiDisabledReason: Semantic embedding is disabled. Enable AI and generate semantic embeddings in Settings.
commandPalette.embedModelMissingReason: Semantic embedding has no embedding model configured. Choose one in Settings.
commandPalette.embeddingsMissingReason: Semantic embedding is not ready yet. Generate semantic embeddings in Settings.

imageTools.emptyQueue: Add images from Browse or Catalog.
imageTools.resizeTooltip: Resize longest edge. 0 = no resize (default from Settings)
imageTools.dropHint: Drop or paste images to convert directly
imageTools.selectOrDrop: Select images from the catalog or drop files here

precheck.title: Pre-Check
precheck.sub: Drop image files to check for duplicates, naming issues, and optimization opportunities before adding to a project.
precheck.dropPrompt: Drop or paste images here, or click to select
precheck.supportedFormats: PNG, JPG, GIF, WebP, AVIF, SVG · up to 64 MB total
precheck.emptySub: Upload images above to see verdicts.

verdictReason.exactMatch: An asset with identical content already exists in the catalog.
verdictReason.nearMatch: Visually similar assets exist; review before adding.
verdictReason.aiQuality: AI detected quality issues with this image.
verdictReason.aiSuitability: AI considers this image unsuitable for the asset library.

optReason.image_dimensions_large: Image dimensions are unusually large for a UI asset.
optReason.asset_file_large: File size is large; may impact load performance.
optReason.png_without_alpha: PNG without alpha often compresses better as JPEG, WebP, or AVIF.
optReason.png_with_alpha: PNG with alpha can be more efficiently stored as WebP.
optReason.svg_can_minify: SVG can be minified to reduce file size.
optReason.svg_contains_embedded_raster: SVG contains embedded raster image data; minifying XML will not meaningfully reduce the embedded bitmap.
optReason.svg_large_low_minify_savings: Large SVG has low XML minification savings; size is likely driven by path complexity or raster-like content.

optSuggestion.use_responsive_or_smaller_source: Consider using responsive images or a smaller source.
optSuggestion.review_compression_or_modern_format: Review compression settings or convert to a modern format.
optSuggestion.try_modern_photographic_format: Try a photographic format for non-transparent raster images.
optSuggestion.try_alpha_preserving_format: Try WebP format which supports alpha with better compression.
optSuggestion.preview_svg_minify: Preview SVG minification to check for visual regressions.
optSuggestion.extract_embedded_raster_or_use_modern_fo: Extract the raster image and use WebP, AVIF, or PNG instead of wrapping it in SVG.
optSuggestion.review_complex_svg_or_raster_format: Simplify the vector artwork, or export it as WebP or AVIF when it is raster-like.

namingIssue.contains_spaces: Filename contains spaces; prefer dashes or underscores.
namingIssue.uppercase_letters: Filename contains uppercase letters; prefer lowercase.
namingIssue.special_chars: Filename contains special characters that may cause URL/path issues.

assetDrawer.ocrNoText: No OCR text is available yet.
assetDrawer.ocrEmptyText: Scanned, but no searchable text was recognized.
assetDrawer.usageEmpty: No code references found. This asset is a deletion candidate.
assetDrawer.usagePossiblyUnused: No references were found, but this project's reference coverage is partial or external consumers may exist. Review manually; this is not included in unused cleanup suggestions.
assetDrawer.usageAssetPack: This file belongs to an Asset pack project. Asset packs are meant for other projects or manual selection, so no code references is normal. Aisets does not mark it as unused or include it in cleanup suggestions.
assetDrawer.usageNotApplicable: This scan did not run usable reference analysis, so Aisets cannot decide whether this file is unused. It is not included in unused cleanup suggestions.

badge.ready: OCR cache is ready and searchable
badge.empty: OCR scanned this image but found no text

ai.ready: AI OCR is ready and searchable
ai.empty: AI OCR scanned this image but found no text

notComputed.referencesDesc: Fast scans skip reference analysis, so unused assets are not available for this scan.
notComputed.nearDesc: Fast scans keep exact duplicate data only. Run a full scan to compare visually similar assets.
notComputed.optimizationDesc: Fast scans skip format and compression suggestions. Run a full scan to review optimizable assets.
notComputed.nearSkippedDesc: Your catalog has {{count}} assets. Near-duplicate comparison was automatically skipped to avoid long scan times. You can still run it manually.

unused.title: Unused
unused.description: Assets with no code references found in the last scan. Review before deleting.
unused.emptyDesc: All scanned assets have code references.

rename.replaceSpaces: Replace spaces & special chars with underscore

projects.noProjectsDesc: Add a project folder or adjust your search.
projects.projectIconHint: PNG, JPEG, GIF, or WebP up to 512 KB. Used in project cards and project lists.
projects.projectIconTypeError: Choose a PNG, JPEG, GIF, or WebP image.
projects.projectIconSizeError: Project image must be 512 KB or smaller.
projects.removeConfirm: Remove {{name}} from this workspace? Files are not deleted.

aiAction.tagHint: Run AI Tag to analyze this image
aiAction.ocrHint: Run AI OCR to extract text from this image
aiAction.busyHint: Please wait for the AI task to finish

prompts.title: Prompt Editor
prompts.emptyState: Select a preset or create a new one

var.categories: List of valid categories for classification
var.fileMetadata: File metadata (format, size, dimensions) — injected automatically at request time
var.lintFindings: Lint findings for this asset — injected automatically at request time
var.optimizationFindings: Rule-based optimization analysis — injected automatically at request time
var.leftMetadata: Metadata for the first (left) image — filled automatically
var.rightMetadata: Metadata for the second (right) image — filled automatically
var.distance: dHash distance between the two images (0-64) — filled automatically
var.precheckFindings: Pre-check analysis results (duplicates, naming, optimization) — injected automatically
var.qualityIssues: Image quality issue codes for detection
var.translations: Multilingual translations (category + tags + description) — injected automatically at request time

prompts.systemDescription: This prompt is automatically prepended to all AI operations
prompts.systemEmptyDesc: A system prompt is automatically prepended to all AI operations (Tag, OCR, Optimize, Duplicate). Use it to set response language, output style, or any global instruction.
prompts.systemNotice: This prompt is automatically prepended to all AI operations. Set as default to activate.
prompts.systemNoticeDisabled: System prompt is disabled. Enable to prepend to all AI operations.
